_meta.description: Mneme Ship Design System — Sensor Catalog. Sensors are Level-2 components that provide detection, navigation, and scientific data.

sensors.name: Optical Navigation Sextant
sensors.notes: Manual star sightings for position fixes. Basis: Apollo sextant.

sensors.name: Star Tracker
sensors.notes: Automatic star pattern recognition for attitude determination. Basis: Skylab, Viking.

sensors.name: Radar Altimeter
sensors.notes: Measures altitude above surface for landing. Basis: Apollo LM radar, Shuttle landing radar.

sensors.name: GPS Receiver
sensors.notes: Satellite navigation for LEO and surface. Basis: First space GPS receivers.

sensors.name: LiDAR Altimeter
sensors.notes: Laser ranging for precision landing and terrain mapping. Basis: MSL sky crane, OSIRIS-REx.

sensors.name: Vision-Based Navigation Camera
sensors.notes: Camera-based terrain relative navigation for autonomous landing. Basis: Falcon 9 landing, HLS.

sensors.name: Imaging Spectrometer
sensors.notes: Multi-wavelength surface composition mapping. Basis: Voyager, Galileo.

sensors.name: Space Telescope
sensors.notes: High-resolution optical/IR astronomy. Basis: Hubble Space Telescope.

sensors.name: Synthetic Aperture Radar
sensors.notes: All-weather surface imaging through clouds. Basis: Seasat, Magellan.

sensors.name: High-Gain Communication Dish
sensors.notes: Parabolic dish for long-range telemetry. Basis: Apollo CSM, Voyager.

sensors.name: Optical Communication Terminal
sensors.notes: Laser-based high-bandwidth communication. Basis: NASA LCRD, Artemis comms.
